'''dozazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twatting|twatting]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twatting|twatting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dozazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozazithi|dozazithi]] || [[word:dozaziji|dozaziji]] || [[word:dozazishi|dozazishi]] || [[word:dozaziki|dozaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozazuthuthu|dozazuthuthu]] || [[word:dozazujuju|dozazujuju]] || [[word:dozazushushu|dozazushushu]] || [[word:dozazukuku|dozazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozazuthu|dozazuthu]] || [[word:dozazuju|dozazuju]] || [[word:dozazushu|dozazushu]] || [[word:dozazuku|dozazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozazufthuf|dozazufthuf]] || [[word:dozazufjuf|dozazufjuf]] || [[word:dozazufshuf|dozazufshuf]] || [[word:dozazufkuf|dozazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozazethe|dozazethe]] || [[word:dozazeje|dozazeje]] || [[word:dozazeshe|dozazeshe]] || [[word:dozazeke|dozazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozazothotho|dozazothotho]] || [[word:dozazojojo|dozazojojo]] || [[word:dozazoshosho|dozazoshosho]] || [[word:dozazokoko|dozazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozazotho|dozazotho]] || [[word:dozazojo|dozazojo]] || [[word:dozazosho|dozazosho]] || [[word:dozazoko|dozazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozazofthof|dozazofthof]] || [[word:dozazofjof|dozazofjof]] || [[word:dozazofshof|dozazofshof]] || [[word:dozazofkof|dozazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfthÃŸf|dozazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfjÃŸf|dozazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfshÃŸf|dozazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfkÃŸf|dozazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dozazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dozazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dozazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dozazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfthÃŸf|dozazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfjÃŸf|dozazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfshÃŸf|dozazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfkÃŸf|dozazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfthÃŸf|dozazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfjÃŸf|dozazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfshÃŸf|dozazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dozazÃŸfkÃŸf|dozazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozazÃḊthÃḊ|dozazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dozazÃḊjÃḊ|dozazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dozazÃḊshÃḊ|dozazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dozazÃḊkÃḊ|dozazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozazathatha|dozazathatha]] || [[word:dozazajaja|dozazajaja]] || [[word:dozazashasha|dozazashasha]] || [[word:dozazakaka|dozazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozazatha|dozazatha]] || [[word:dozazaja|dozazaja]] || [[word:dozazasha|dozazasha]] || [[word:dozazaka|dozazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozazafthaf|dozazafthaf]] || [[word:dozazafjaf|dozazafjaf]] || [[word:dozazafshaf|dozazafshaf]] || [[word:dozazafkaf|dozazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dozazasha|dozazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozazshÃḋsha|dozazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozazrosha|dozazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozazmusha|dozazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozazyasha|dozazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozaznkshÃḋsha|godozaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozaznkrosha|godozaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozaznkmusha|godozaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozaznkyasha|godozaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dozazazasha|dozazazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozazazshÃḋsha|dozazazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozazazrosha|dozazazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozazazmusha|dozazazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozazazyasha|dozazazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozazaznkshÃḋsha|godozazaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozazaznkrosha|godozazaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozazaznkmusha|godozazaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozazaznkyasha|godozazaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dezÃḊzasha|dezÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dezÃḊzshÃḋsha|dezÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dezÃḊzrosha|dezÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dezÃḊzmusha|dezÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dezÃḊzyasha|dezÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godezÃḊznkshÃḋsha|godezÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godezÃḊznkrosha|godezÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godezÃḊznkmusha|godezÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godezÃḊznkyasha|godezÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dozfazasha|dozfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozfazshÃḋsha|dozfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozfazrosha|dozfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozfazmusha|dozfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozfazyasha|dozfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozfaznkshÃḋsha|godozfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozfaznkrosha|godozfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozfaznkmusha|godozfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozfaznkyasha|godozfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
